description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a panda bear, featuring a rounded head with two prominent black ears and black circular patches around its eyes. The face is simple, with small black eyes and a tiny black nose, giving it a neutral and gentle expression. Its body is plump and segmented into black and white sections, mimicking the natural coloration of a panda, with a white belly and black arms and legs. The arms are slightly outstretched, and the legs are positioned as if the toy is sitting. The surface texture appears slightly rough, suggesting a fabric material with a visible weave. The toy is compact and soft, likely filled with synthetic stuffing to maintain its shape and plushness.
description: A plush panda bear stuffed toy with black and white coloration, rounded features, and a soft, textured surface. It has a gentle, neutral expression and a sitting posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the panda's face with black eye patches, small nose, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, ear, and the sitting position of the legs.
description_view_2: Back view displays the solid white back of the head and body, with black arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, ear, and the sitting posture.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with small black eyes and a tiny black nose, giving a calm and gentle appearance. There is no visible mouth or eyebrows, contributing to the simplicity of the expression.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The stuffed toy is sitting upright with its arms slightly outstretched and legs extended forward. The head is upright and facing forward.
